landing.details.title: Focused on practice, not studio setup.
landing.features.practice.text: Change tempo and key so difficult parts become playable before they become fast.
landing.features.practice.title: Practice without friction
landing.features.record.text: Record takes in the browser and compare them against the source material.
landing.features.record.title: Browser recording
landing.features.study.text: Load audio, inspect the waveform and spectrum, and jump to the moments that matter.
landing.features.study.title: Song study
landing.flow.note: The landing is ready for Cloudflare Pages: static build, no server, no environment variables.
landing.hero.lead: A browser workspace for musicians to study songs, slow down hard sections, inspect sound structure, and record parts.
landing.hero.title: Musetric
privacy.contact.body: For privacy questions or requests, contact Musetric at
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.data.audio: Musetric does not require a user account.
privacy.data.contact: Musetric does not collect personal data through this landing website.
privacy.data.project: If you contact us by email, we receive the email address and message content that you choose to send, and keep it only as needed to respond.
privacy.data.technical: Our hosting provider may process standard technical logs needed to deliver and protect the website.
privacy.data.title: Information we collect
privacy.overview.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Musetric handles information for the current Musetric landing website and app release. Musetric is operated by the Musetric developer team.
privacy.overview.title: Overview
privacy.security.body: We use reasonable measures to protect the website and support communications, including HTTPS for public website traffic.
privacy.security.title: Security
privacy.sharing.body: We do not sell personal or sensitive user data. Support emails may be processed by the email provider we use, and technical website logs may be processed by hosting providers.
privacy.sharing.title: Sharing
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.use.body: We use support emails only to respond to requests. Technical logs are used to deliver the website, maintain reliability, and protect against abuse.
privacy.use.title: How we use information
support.contact.body: For support, bug reports, privacy questions, or Google Play verification inquiries, email
support.contact.title: Contact
support.include.body: Include your device or browser, operating system, a short description of the issue, and any relevant screenshots or project details that do not contain sensitive information.
support.include.title: What to include
support.response.body: We aim to review support requests within a reasonable time. Response time may vary while Musetric is in early development.
support.response.title: Response time
support.title: Support
